creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 227266
www/node14: Update to 14.17.5

Changelog: https://github.com/nodejs/node/blob/master/doc/changelogs/CHANGELOG_V14.md#14.17.5

Differential Revision: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D31433

It includes an out-of-tree patch, being tracked in: https://github.com/nodejs/node/pull/39739

Also, fix sorting in pkg-plist to reduce the diffs with make makeplist
